title: Abu Dhabi Sells $3 Billion in Dollar Bonds Amid EM Surge
description: Abu Dhabi raised $3 billion from a sale of dollar bonds in its first debt offering of the year.
content: Abu Dhabi raised $3 billion from a sale of dollar bonds in its first debt offering of the year.
